name: charlie-suite
description: Suite Charlie — Emailing, Scraper LinkedIn et Studio de posts sur un seul site (http://localhost:3005)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n emailing,scraper,posts -c green,yellow,blue "npm --prefix apps/emailing run dev" "npm --prefix apps/scraper run dev" "cd apps/posts/server && node index.js"
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm --prefix apps/emailing install && npm --prefix apps/scraper install && npm --prefix apps/posts run install-all && npm run build:posts
